title: The Cost of War
content: THEME: Corporate rivalry masking as street beef. MOTIFS: Unsolved hits, paying bail for loyalty, trusting the wrong inner circle. VIBE: Paranoia, heavy consequences, realizing fame doesn't stop bullets.

title: Scorekeeping
content: THEME: High-velocity retaliation and the modern Drill era. MOTIFS: Putting bounties on heads, mocking the dead, generational cycles of violence. VIBE: Aggressive, cold, hyper-focused on territory.

title: The Crab Bucket
content: THEME: The dangers of independent success in a jealous city. MOTIFS: Rejecting bad record deals, surviving ambushes, buying bulletproof trucks. VIBE: Defiant independence, outsmarting the local bosses.

title: The Tournament
content: THEME: Risking it all for the crown. MOTIFS: Minimum wage street levels versus kingpin payouts, surviving the odds, treating the block like Wall Street. VIBE: Calculated risk, desperate hustle, ambition.

title: The Shadow Economy
content: THEME: Turning illicit cash into corporate power. MOTIFS: Laundering money through record labels, using streaming farms to clean cash, transitioning from the trap to the boardroom. VIBE: Executive boss status, moving in silence.

title: The Studio Gangster
content: THEME: Exposing the fake industry plants. MOTIFS: Rappers who fabricate their past, hiding behind security, renting cars for videos. VIBE: Disrespectful, exposing the truth, asserting absolute dominance over fakes.

title: Omerta
content: THEME: The absolute code of silence. MOTIFS: Refusing to speak to authorities, the permanent stain of a rat, serving prison time honorably. VIBE: Loyalty above freedom, disgust for informants.

title: The Hierarchy
content: THEME: The chain of command in the streets. MOTIFS: The Don insulated at the top, lieutenants collecting dues, shooters protecting the brand. VIBE: Organized crime, absolute discipline, corporate-level structure.

title: The Interstate Flyway
content: THEME: Logistics of moving product across state lines. MOTIFS: Rental car fleets, decoy vehicles, using trucking companies as fronts. VIBE: High-stakes travel, technical precision, constant surveillance.

title: The RICO Playbook
content: THEME: The government's war on street organizations. MOTIFS: Wiretaps, social media as evidence, the 'Kingpin Act', flipping small players to get to the boss. VIBE: Clinical, threatening, the feeling of the walls closing in.

title: Gentrifying the Trap
content: THEME: Buying back the block. MOTIFS: Using drug money to buy legitimate property, the tension between old residents and new developers, the 'Safe House' becoming a storefront. VIBE: Ironic, strategic, long-term legacy building.

title: The Ghost of the Greats
content: THEME: How the legends are commodified after death. MOTIFS: Hologram tours, posthumous albums, families fighting over estates, the myth outgrowing the man. VIBE: Melancholic, commercial, immortalized.
